title: Agent Harnesses and Runtime Systems
description: The runtime layer that turns agent architectures into executable systems — managing the agent loop, tool dispatch, context and state flow, persistence, observability, error recovery, and human intervention across real production harnesses.

lessons.title: What Is an Agent Harness?
lessons.description: Defining the harness as a runtime layer and the eight concerns every harness must solve

lessons.title: The Agent Loop Internals
lessons.description: Runs, turns, steps, and the decision points where the harness controls agent behavior

lessons.title: Tool Dispatch and Action Validation
lessons.description: From tool-call request to function execution: dispatch pipelines, MCP discovery, and permission boundaries

lessons.title: Context, Goals, Memory, and State
lessons.description: The four state domains a harness manages and how context is assembled each turn

lessons.title: Control Flow: Loops, Routers, Graphs, and Workflows
lessons.description: Four control flow models, the autonomy spectrum, and handoffs as runtime events

lessons.title: Persistence, Checkpointing, and Resumability
lessons.description: Why runs need durability and how checkpointing enables recovery, inspection, time travel, and human intervention

lessons.title: Human-in-the-Loop and Intervention Points
lessons.description: Approval gates, escalation triggers, the autonomy-oversight spectrum, and the production triad

lessons.title: Observability: Traces, Logs, Evals, and Replay
lessons.description: Five observability pillars, trace anatomy, cost/latency tracking, and realistic replay levels

lessons.title: Build a Minimal Harness from Scratch
lessons.description: Hands-on: implement the canonical loop, tool registry, context assembly, and termination controls

lessons.title: Extend the Harness: State, Checkpoints, Tracing, and Intervention
lessons.description: Hands-on: add structured state, checkpoint/resume with idempotency, tracing, and an approval gate

lessons.title: Ecosystem Map: SDKs, Graph Runtimes, Workflow Runtimes, Multi-Agent Runtimes
lessons.description: Classify and compare production harnesses across the eight concerns

lessons.title: Choosing a Harness + Frontier Appendix
lessons.description: Decision framework for harness selection plus emerging runtime directions
